name: unified_instadoc
description: ``` unified_instadoc/ │ ├── index.html                  ← Landing page (main entry point) ├── style.css                   ← ID Metric landing page styles ├── script.js                   ← ID Metric misc scripts (consultation helper etc.) ├── consultation.html ├── consultation.js ├── consultation_firebase.js ├── about.html ├── contact.html ├── services.html ├── Performance_Metrics.html ├── Real_time_analytics_services.html ├── predictive_analytics.html ├── resource_optimization.html │ ├── app/                        ← INSTADOC dashboard (patient + doctor) │   ├── index.html │   ├── script.js │   └── style.css │ └── admin/                      ← Admin panel (admin-only access)     ├── index.html     ├── script.js     └── style.css ```
